历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 11540 → 12995 → 17563 → 14292, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, there was a significant fluctuation (17563), and in 2025 it rebounded to 14292. The fluctuation range over the past 3 years is about 4500 places, with average stability. The provincial physics category enrollment plan was 8 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 5 in 2025, and remains at 5 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, about 81st in 2026, slightly improved from 82nd in 2025, with a stable and rising trend in recent years. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed (air conditioning fee controversy, limited impact). Douyin popularity ranks 49th overall (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, having a slight positive effect on application attention. No obvious gap signal was found in historical admission records. Foreign Language and Literature is A+ (top in the country), which has low correlation with physics category majors (Data Science and Big Data Technology, Actuarial Science) but supports the overall brand of the school.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Data Science and Big Data Technology and Actuarial Science are socially hot, with the big data/AI direction continuing to heat up. The total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% from about 463,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the physics category enrollment plan in 2026 being unchanged from 2025 (no expansion or contraction effect), the provincial examinee count increasing by about 15.6% (intensified competition), the school's ranking steadily rising, and the high popularity of big data/AI majors, and taking into account the boosting effect of increased candidates on competition, the predicted minimum ranking is about 14242, with a range of 13742–14742.
